# Express Delivery

Express delivery costs NT$150 and arrives 1–2 business days after dispatch on the main-island. Orders must be placed and paid before 14:00 the same day to qualify; oversized-items and fragile-items are not eligible.

[Source: shipping_faq.md#express-delivery]
